title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: Tapping the "Go" button on a paired device's detail modal opens the Poly Contact Support page in a browser.
steps: 3. Observe the list of paired devices displayed.
4. Tap on a device from the list.
5. Observe the modal that appears with device details (name, product ID, serial number, software version, headset revision, last connected) and a 'Go' button.
7. Observe the browser opening to the Poly Contact Support page.
expected: A modal appears with device details (name, product ID, serial number, software version, headset revision, last connected) and a "Go" button. Tapping "Go" opens the Poly Contact Support page in a browser.
